---

## 1. Identity

---
- **Brand name:** Imagine This Printed
- **Tagline / one-liner:** Creator-led apparel for the modern fan.
- **Mission / promise:** To empower creators by transforming their digital art into premium, comic-book-inspired apparel that fans and collectors will treasure. We handle the logistics; you focus on the art.
- **Voice:** Passionate, bold, and collaborative, speaking the language of comic book culture and digital artistry.
- **Audience:** Digital creators (illustrators, comic artists) and their dedicated fans (fandom collectors, pop culture enthusiasts).
- **Do / Don't:**
    - **Do:** Emphasize premium quality, celebrate artistry, use dynamic visuals.
    - **Don't:** Use generic mockups, feel like a mass-market drop-shipper.

---
---

## 2. Visual North Star

---
Our visual direction channels the tactile elegance of high-end print media. We lead with the bold, expressive character of `var(--font-serif-display)` for headlines, evoking the confidence of a magazine masthead. This is balanced by the clean readability of `var(--font-sans-body)` for text, ensuring clarity and comfort. The palette is intentionally restrained, built on a foundation of `var(--color-paper-white)` and `var(--color-ink-black)`, allowing the content and imagery to take center stage, much like ink on paper.

**Mood Board (Curated by Amelia Chan):**
- [Read.cv](https://www.read.cv/)
- [The Ken Redesign Concept (Dribbble)](https://dribbble.com/shots/17204980-The-Ken-Redesign-Concept)
- [The New Yorker Digital Experience (Behance)](https://www.behance.net/gallery/100349489/The-New-Yorker-A-Digital-Experience)
- [Art of It Magazine](https://www.artofit.com/)
- [MAAP — The Art of the Chase](https://www.maap.cc/)

## 5. Spacing, Layout, Radius, Shadow

**Tailwind tokens detected:**

- **Spacing**:
```
'18': '4.5rem',
        '22': '5.5rem',
        '30': '7.5rem',
```
- **Border radius**:
```
'4xl': '2rem',
        '5xl': '2.5rem',
```
- **Box shadow**:
```
'soft': '0 4px 20px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',
        'soft-lg': '0 10px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12)',
        'soft-xl': '0 20px 60px -15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)',
        'inner-soft': 'inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',
        'glow': '0 0 20px var(--primary)',
        'glow-sm': '0 0 10px var(--secondary)',
        'glow-lg': '0 0 40px var(--accent)',
```

## 9. Iconography

- **Library:** `lucide-react` (detected)
- Size scale: 14 / 16 / 20 / 24 (default)
- Stroke: 1.75 default
- Never mix icon sets.

---

## 10. Accessibility

- Contrast 4.5:1 body, 3:1 large text
- Focus ring: `ring-2 ring-[--accent] ring-offset-2`
- Honor `prefers-reduced-motion`
- Min tap target 44×44

## 12. Change Protocol

Default scope = entire project. Override with "homepage only" / "dashboard only" / etc.
